description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a complex, multi-gabled roof and a light-colored exterior. The front features a covered porch with columns, multiple windows in symmetrical rows, and a prominent central gable. The backyard is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes a swimming pool, a play structure, and a grassy area, suggesting a family-oriented design. The house has several entry points, including a main front door and a rear entrance leading to the backyard. The windows are mostly rectangular and evenly spaced, contributing to a balanced and traditional appearance. The roof is primarily gabled with intersecting sections, and the overall structure is spacious, likely constructed from wood framing with exterior siding.
description: A spacious, two-story suburban house with a gabled roof, covered porch, and a fenced backyard featuring a pool and play area. The exterior is light-colored with symmetrical windows and multiple entryways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entryway, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the multi-gabled roof and a glimpse of the backyard with the pool and play area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, swimming pool, play structure, and rear entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, the side yard, and part of the backyard fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, central front door, and steps leading up to the entry
